heading: Transfer of funds from appropriations account of the Office of the Vice President and the Offices of the Secretaries for the Majority and Minority to the Senate contingent fund
label: 6101 Transfer of funds from appropriations account of the Office of the Vice President and the Offices of the Secretaries for the Majority and Minority to the Senate contingent fund
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 31a–2d of this titleSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2005, which is div. G of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2005.

children.heading: Office of the Vice President
children.label: a Office of the Vice President

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Upon the written request of the Vice President, the Secretary of the Senate shall transfer from the appropriations account appropriated under the subheading “” under the heading “” such amount as the Vice President shall specify to the appropriations account under the heading “” within the contingent fund of the Senate.office of the vice presidentSalaries, Officers and Employeesmiscellaneous items

children.heading: Authority to incur expenses
children.label: 2 Authority to incur expenses
children.text: The Vice President may incur such expenses as may be necessary or appropriate. Expenses incurred by the Vice President shall be paid from the amount transferred under paragraph (1) by the Vice President and upon vouchers approved by the Vice President.

children.heading: Authority to advance sums
children.label: 3 Authority to advance sums
children.text: The Secretary of the Senate may advance such sums as may be necessary to defray expenses incurred in carrying out paragraphs (1) and (2).

children.heading: Offices of the Secretaries for the Majority and Minority
children.label: b Offices of the Secretaries for the Majority and Minority

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Upon the written request of the Secretary for the Majority or the Secretary for the Minority, the Secretary of the Senate shall transfer from the appropriations account appropriated under the subheading “” under the heading “” such amount as the Secretary for the Majority or the Secretary for the Minority shall specify to the appropriations account under the heading “” within the contingent fund of the Senate.offices of the secretaries for the majority and minoritySalaries, Officers and Employeesmiscellaneous items

children.heading: Authority to incur expenses
children.label: 2 Authority to incur expenses
children.text: The Secretary for the Majority or the Secretary for the Minority may incur such expenses as may be necessary or appropriate. Expenses incurred by the Secretary for the Majority or the Secretary for the Minority shall be paid from the amount transferred under paragraph (1) by the Secretary for the Majority or the Secretary for the Minority and upon vouchers approved by the Secretary for the Majority or the Secretary for the Minority, as applicable.

children.heading: Authority to advance sums
children.label: 3 Authority to advance sums
children.text: The Secretary of the Senate may advance such sums as may be necessary to defray expenses incurred in carrying out paragraphs (1) and (2).

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply to fiscal year 2005 and each fiscal year thereafter.
